# merge(other:)

**Instance Method**

Merge another object of this type into this object.

## Declaration

```swift
@discardableResult mutating func merge(other: AssignableDocument) throws -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **other**: The other object to merge into this one.

## Discussion

An exception is thrown if `other` is not a replica of this document.

## Merging the parts

- **merge(_:)**: Merge another object of this type into this object.
- **merge(partData:into:)**: Merges an individual part into the specified part of this object.
- **merge(partID:partDataURL:)**: Merges an individual part’s data into the specified part of this object.
